_publications._publicationTitle: Nilotinib is more potent than imatinib for treating plexiform neurofibroma in vitro and in vivo.

_contextSnippet: The initial sizes of the xenografts were comparable among the control, nilotinib and imatinib groups, which were 6.0 ±3.7 mm 3 , 5.9 ±2.5 mm 3 and 5.2 ±3.4 mm 3
details: Successfully measured xenograft volumes to track tumor size changes over 28-day treatment period, detecting significant differences between treatment groups
